nasb.text: Moreover, the priests and the Levites who were in all Israel stood with him from all their districts.

esv.text: And the priests and the Levites who were in all Israel presented themselves to him from all places where they lived.

cnv.text: 全以色列的祭司和利未人，都從各地來歸向羅波安。

ccb.text: 以色列全境的祭司和利未人都从四面八方来投奔罗波安。
